author: codex-gpt5

patch.value: Add generic create/update setter for extension item fields

GitHub issue #97: registerItemFields exposes custom fields to contracts/validation, but standalone extensions cannot populate those fields through pm create/update without description marker hacks. Duplicate check: pm search for registerItemFields custom fields create update field setter importer provenance found no open direct duplicate. Desired outcome: repeatable generic setter such as --field name=value on create and update, honored for declared extension item fields and reflected in contracts/help.

message: Track GitHub #97 from gh issue audit.
